rulings.Case Title: EST. OF ANNA MARIA FRANCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/18/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to counsel with the following issues: 1) Please provide a specific list of assets on hand as of a date certain, including specific amount of cash and specific number of shares of stock. The proposed distribution must also be specific, and the cash must also be fully addressed (e.g. payment to attorney in partial satisfaction of attorney compensation). 2) Please allege whether there were any losses on the sale of assets, if so, the fee base for the statutory fees must be adjusted. 3) Notice to prior attorney has not been provided (Anne Marie Paolini). Please also allege whether there is any fee splitting arrangement. 4) Please allege why preliminary distribution was made without prior court order. It is noted that, although Petitioner alleges that she took action under her authority as trustee, no testamentary trust was ever established. 5) Please allege whether the Department of Health Care Services, the California Victim Compensation Board, and the Franchise Tax Board have been given notice / not needed under Probate Code 9202. If notice was given, please allege when notice was sent. Please note that the applicable time period must lapse after notice is properly given prior to the estate closing. 6) Please file a revised proposed order: a. The caption of the order must begin with Order of Final Distribution and should also reference the granting of the approval of the report and fees (e.g. Order of Final Distribution, Approving First and Final Report of Executor, Approving Fees). b. Corrections should be made as a result of addressing the issues above, including listing specific assets on hand and for distribution. 7) Notice of Hearing has not been provided (which must be by mail, unless the proper Judicial Council Form is filed consenting to e-service).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EVELYN CECELIA OLSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 1/27/25 have not yet been addressed. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CLEMMIE THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 06/16/2025 for the following outstanding issues to be addressed: 1) No DE-147S form is on file. A pleading cover sheet must be attached to this form. 2) Each "amendment" to the petition requires new notice including new publication. See CRC 7.53(a). Item 2 of the DE-121 form must specifically refer to "First Amendment and Second Amendment to" (Petition for Probate). 3) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-121 form at least 15 days before the hearing.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARUKI SETO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 12/10/93. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required, although the second supplement to the petition was signed and verified by the attorney, not by the proposed fiduciary. [CRC 7.103(c).] Status hearing will be set for 6/1/26. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 6/1/26, no appearance will be required on that date.
